dropzone.idle: Drag and drop a file here, or click to select one.

status.saving_blockchain: File uploaded to IPFS. Saving transaction on Blockchain...
status.tx_success_db_failed: Transaction succeeded, but saving to database failed.
status.ipfs_failed: IPFS upload failed. Please try again.
status.insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds for transaction. Please recharge your wallet.
status.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
status.invalid_file_type: Invalid file type. Please upload a PDF, PNG, JPEG, JSON, ZIP, or MP4 file.
status.file_too_large: The file exceeds the maximum limit of {{maxSize}}.
status.metamask_not_found: MetaMask not found. Please install the extension and try again.
status.wallet_connection_failed: Wallet connection failed. Please try again.
status.network_error: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.
status.pending_cid_hint: ⚠️ File already uploaded to IPFS (CID: {{cid}}…). You can retry the blockchain transaction without re-uploading the file.
status.pending_save_hint: ⚠️ Blockchain transaction completed (Tx: {{tx}}…) but not saved to history. Retry saving.
status.file_already_exists: This document has already been uploaded to the blockchain (duplicate CID).

error_boundary.title: ⚠️ Ops! Something went wrong
error_boundary.description: Sorry, an unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.

certificate.title: Transaction Certificate
certificate.subtitle: Notarion - Distributed Ledger Technologies Validation
certificate.footer_1: This document certifies that the file has been successfully uploaded to IPFS and recorded on the Ethereum blockchain.
certificate.footer_2: Generated by Notarion - Validation DApp with Distributed Ledger Technologies

history.title: Upload History
history.no_uploads: No uploads found for this wallet.
history.fetch_error: Could not load upload history. Check the server connection.
